channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-26 10:46 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Este es el fin último de las organizaciones de “derechos humanos”. Vean todo el caso, desde el inici...
item.description: Este es el fin último de las organizaciones de “derechos humanos”. Vean todo el caso, desde el inicio hasta el final que pretenden; cada uno de los pasos es parte de la “tutela de derechos humanos” conseguida con sus “luchas y conquistas”. Jamás los escucharemos, no importa cuánto nos ataquen. No tienen nada que venir a decirnos; más bien, nosotros deberíamos estar denunciándolos a ustedes por lo que le hacen a mujeres como Noelia. El mundo necesita urgentemente liberarse de estas organizaciones, que no son más que los bufetes de abogados de los delincuentes, que prefieren LITERALMENTE matar a las víctimas en lugar de protegerlas.

item.title: @elonmusk: We won the popular vote. We control the Supreme Court. We won majorities in the House and Senate. Am...
item.description: We won the popular vote. We control the Supreme Court. We won majorities in the House and Senate. Americans want GOP policies and Voter ID is supported by 80%+ of all Americans. And all John Thune can do is make excuses for his incompetence and backstabbing.

item.title: @elonmusk: Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson: “We cannot put people in jail anymore. It’s racist.” I can't believe ...
item.description: Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson: “We cannot put people in jail anymore. It’s racist.” I can't believe this is real

item.title: @elonmusk: Our FU Superchargers (Folding Unit) save 20%+ on cost, improve build quality, and deploy 2X faster. ...
item.description: Our FU Superchargers (Folding Unit) save 20%+ on cost, improve build quality, and deploy 2X faster. The majority of cost savings are in civil, electrical and logistics cost. It's why we're spending so much time improving our pre-assembled Supercharger units. With FU Superchargers, on-site work is further reduced, including no more DC busbar connection and no Tesla service technician needed for commissioning. We can ship 16 Supercharger posts per truck (previously 12), making the logistics cost of shipping pre-assembled Superchargers now cheaper than traditional construction 🤯. This is just Rev1, we'll have Rev3 by next quarter. Every little improvement matters for the scale needed for 100% EV adoption.

item.title: @elonmusk: NEWS: A Florida judge has recused himself from overseeing a lawsuit against@Teslaover a fatal crash ...
item.description: NEWS: A Florida judge has recused himself from overseeing a lawsuit against@Teslaover a fatal crash after a hot mic moment that Tesla said shows he had prejudged disputed issues in the case and was biased against the company and Elon Musk.law360.com/subscribe/email_v…

item.title: @elonmusk: If you are a Tesla shareholder, please read the following step-by-step instructions for filing a com...
item.description: If you are a Tesla shareholder, please read the following step-by-step instructions for filing a complaint in judicial misconduct against Chancellor Kathaleen McCormick. Given the clear evidence of bias in her ruling, it’s more than justified.

item.title: @elonmusk: Welcome to Holly Angles Hospice, this is the Learing Center of California's hospice fraud. Fraudster...
item.description: Welcome to Holly Angles Hospice, this is the Learing Center of California's hospice fraud. Fraudsters use: - Elderly - Children - Autistic/disabled They use the most vulnerable to steal millions from hardworking, law-abiding taxpayers while living in luxury END ALL THE FRAUD.

item.title: @elonmusk: Vikings in the Mist! 30-second extended video from Grok Imagine Update your Grok app ! It just gets ...
item.description: Vikings in the Mist! 30-second extended video from Grok Imagine Update your Grok app ! It just gets better and better with every update.

item.title: @elonmusk: Reach for the Moon with Grok Imagine. Twice the magic. Doubled down. You’ll feel it. Don’t miss it. ...
item.description: Reach for the Moon with Grok Imagine. Twice the magic. Doubled down. You’ll feel it. Don’t miss it. Stay updated.

item.title: @elonmusk: 4 White British girls were sexually assaulted by 18 migrants over the course of 24 hours and the med...
item.description: 4 White British girls were sexually assaulted by 18 migrants over the course of 24 hours and the media says nothing. Do you get it yet

item.title: @elonmusk: 1. Understanding and generating videos are mutually beneficial. They are the training materials for ...
item.description: 1. Understanding and generating videos are mutually beneficial. They are the training materials for physics and embodied AI, e.g. Optimus. 2. Real-time video generation is the most direct and flexible AI-native user interface. It's possible that it will subsume all frontend UIs.

item.title: @elonmusk: When@elonmuskstarted@SpaceX, he didn't ask for a contract. He rewrote the terms.@EricJorgensonexplai...
item.description: When@elonmuskstarted@SpaceX, he didn't ask for a contract. He rewrote the terms.@EricJorgensonexplains why: "Elon went to the people actually awarding these contracts and said 'We want an outcome-based contract. I want to be incentivized to drive down the cost. I want to be incentivized to hit the deadlines.' For all the talk that happens about him doing things that have never been done before, the things that he's doing that have never been done before are because he drives cost down. And he drives cost down because the vision is not 'Make as much money as I can.' It wasn't 'Start a new aerospace company that's as profitable as possible.' It was 'Get us to Mars.' That is a heroic thing to go in and say 'I know I could get paid X to do mediocre work, but I actually want to take the risk. I want to burn the boats. I want my back to the wall. I want to know that we have to clear this threshold that nobody has ever crossed before. And I want to go tell my team that because that's how we're actually going to achieve this objective that everybody thinks I'm crazy for setting.'"
